text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove! Um, thank you for the present. It
arrived at the dorm this morning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I hope you didn't mind receiving running wear
again this year. I thought about getting
something else, but nothing felt right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, I really love it. When I run in something new,
it feels especially good.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What's more, you always pick the nicest running
wear. It's comfy and breathable—absolutely
perfect.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little embarrassed to get that much praise,
but... so long as you like it, I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Good... Though I was wondering, can I ask for one
more present?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sure, let me hear it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, the new clothes are great... but I'd like to
wear them while running with you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to run with you as much as I can... Is that
okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's easy enough! I'll schedule time
between my student council duties.
